meta.race_name: Encore Educational For Early Years Supplies Handicap Chase (Go North Red Rum Qualifier) (GBB Race)

rankings.name: Upfordebate
key_positive_factors: Brian Hughes booked (exceptionally strong at Sedgefield)
Proven winner with 4 wins in last 6 starts
Handicap mark remains competitive despite 5th last time
key_risks: Needs to bounce back from a below-par run
Sharpness of Sedgefield requires precise jumping

rankings.name: Alright Dai
key_positive_factors: Neil Mulholland is in good form with chase runners
Upwardly mobile profile in this class
key_risks: Up in weights for recent successes
Less experienced over Sedgefield's unique layout

rankings.name: Le Grand Vert
key_positive_factors: Last start winner in emphatic style
Noel Kelly's Irish raiders are always dangerous at northern tracks
Low weight (OR 101) provides significant advantage on 'Good' ground
key_risks: Relies on replicating a career-best effort

rankings.name: Realisation
key_positive_factors: Market favorite with Gavin Sheehan aboard
Very consistent finishing 3rd in last three starts
Stays the trip well and handles good-to-soft
key_risks: Finding it hard to get his head in front (winless in recent starts)
Often finds one or two too good at the finish

rankings.name: Great Notions
key_positive_factors: Top weight indicates class edge if finding old form
Jack Andrews is a capable amateur/conditional
key_risks: Form figures (5P) suggest he is currently out of sorts
Giving weight away to younger, more progressive rivals

rankings.name: Ribeye
key_positive_factors: Trainer Peter Atkinson occasionally pulls off a surprise
key_risks: Looks outclassed on speed figures compared to the favorites

tricast_top_3.combination: Upfordebate > Alright Dai > Le Grand Vert
Upfordebate > Le Grand Vert > Alright Dai
Alright Dai > Upfordebate > Le Grand Vert
